title: Cache Entry
description: One cached fetch response. Stored at gtm_scout_memory/sources_cache/<sha256(url)>.json (global across briefs). A cache hit (now < expires_at and fetch_status ok) skips the fetch and consumes 0 search budget. Loops 1, 2, 3, 5, 6, and 9 read/write these.

content_excerpt.description: Trimmed body / snippet used for extraction. Do NOT store full copyrighted articles or scraped private data.

retry_after_cycle.description: If a transient failure, the cycle to retry on.
